summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing for ASR Enterprises Shop e-commerce features. All backend APIs (15/15) and frontend tests passed. Key features verified: Razorpay live key configuration (rzp_live_SJIqziW7w31a3U), AI service description generation, Wire & Service product configuration with auto-calculated prices, cart/checkout flow with COD and Razorpay payment options, distance-based delivery fees.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All shop e-commerce features working correctly. Razorpay Checkout SDK integrated with live key. Wire products have AC/DC type and 4sqmm/6sqmm size toggles with auto-calculated prices. Service products have AI description generation. Admin login requires email OTP verification.

POST /api/generate-service-description.details: AI generates service descriptions with 'generated: true' flag

GET /api/shop/products.details: Returns all products including wire and service categories

POST /api/shop/products (wire).details: Creates wire product with wire_type and wire_size fields

POST /api/shop/products (service).details: Creates service product with service_type field

POST /api/shop/orders (COD).details: Creates order with COD payment method

POST /api/shop/orders (Razorpay).details: Creates order with Razorpay payment method

GET /api/shop/stats.details: Returns shop statistics (total_products, total_orders, pending_orders, total_revenue)

frontend_shop_page.page_load: PASSED - Shop page loads with products grid
frontend_shop_page.category_filters: PASSED - All 6 categories (Solar Panels, Inverters, Batteries, Solar Wire, Accessories, Services) clickable
frontend_shop_page.product_detail_modal: PASSED - Modal opens on product click, shows description and Add to Cart
frontend_shop_page.cart_functionality: PASSED - Add/remove items, quantity update works
frontend_shop_page.checkout_flow: PASSED - Customer details, delivery options, payment methods (COD/Razorpay) visible

frontend_admin_shop_management.admin_login: PASSED - Email OTP verification works with fallback OTP 131993
frontend_admin_shop_management.shop_management_page: PASSED - Products and Orders tabs visible
frontend_admin_shop_management.wire_configuration: PASSED - Blue section with AC/DC type and 4sqmm/6sqmm size toggles, auto-calculated prices
frontend_admin_shop_management.service_configuration: PASSED - Green section with Service Type dropdown and AI Generate button, base price ₹1,500
frontend_admin_shop_management.warranty_field_hidden: PASSED - Warranty field hidden for Wire and Service categories
